title: centrapalus purpureus
intro: Centrapalus purpureus, also known as Purple Cudweed or Creeping Cudweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits associated with Centrapalus purpureus include soothing skin irritations and reducing inflammation, as well as potentially supporting digestive health. Centrapalus purpureus is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, with some also using it in tincture or salve form for topical application.
